mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tournament (name, creator_id, type, status, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{creatorId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, creator_id AS creatorId, type, status, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tournament ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, name, creator_id AS creatorId, type, status, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tournament WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
